The '''liberation of Clak'dor VII''' was fought at [[Clak'dor VII/Legends|Clak'dor VII]] between the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and the forces of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Sander Delvardus]] in [[5 ABY/Legends|5.5 ABY]].<ref name="TEA" />

After the unsuccessful [[Battle of Sullust (Delvardus campaign)|attack]] of Delvardus on [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]], the New Republic led by the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Sien Sovv]] launched a counterattack campaign for the control of territories of the [[Eriadu Authority]]. The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] fleet dispatched to [[Lwhekk/Legends|Lwhekk]] to deal with the [[Ssi-ruu]]vi was ordered by [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] to aid in the liberation of [[Clak'dor VII/Legends|Clak'dor VII]]; the fleet included the [[Sibwarra|''Shriwirr'']], twelve [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-Bs]], and smaller support ships. The battle was subsequently described as a "merciless assault".<ref name="TEA" />
